mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC(#{timeBucket}, T.CREATED_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS BUCKET, COUNT(T.TRADE_ID) AS TRADECOUNT, SUM(T.QTY) AS TOTALQTY, CAST(AVG(T.PRICE) AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS AVGPRICE, CAST(SUM(T.QTY * (T.PRICE / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2)))) AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS TOTALVOLUME FROM TRADES T LEFT JOIN MARKETS M ON T.SYMBOL = M.SYMBOL WHERE T.CREATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND T.CREATED_AT <= #{endDate} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(T.QTY * (T.PRICE / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2)))), 0.0) FROM TRADES T LEFT JOIN MARKETS M ON T.SYMBOL = M.SYMBOL
SELECT * FROM TRADES WHERE SYMBOL = #{symbol} AND CREATED_AT < #{cutoff} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM TRADES WHERE SYMBOL = #{symbol} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC LIMIT 1
